name: getLocation
description: Generate Google Street View image URLs, interactive Street View links, and Google Maps URLs for one or more locations. Optionally returns driving directions text. Always generates fresh URLs — never reuse from previous calls.

locations.description: List of location names or 'lat,lng' coordinate pairs. The last entry is the destination.

route.description: If true, treat all entries as a route: origin → optional waypoints → destination.

street_size.description: Static Street View image size, e.g. '640x400' (optional).

street_fov.description: Field of view in degrees for the Street View camera (optional).
